name: Oversized Everyday Hoodie
description: A buttery-soft heavyweight hoodie with a relaxed oversized fit, brushed interior, and a kangaroo pocket. Built for lazy Sundays, campus runs, and late-night takeout — somehow makes any outfit feel put together.

name: AeroBuds Pro Wireless Earbuds
description: Active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery with the charging case, transparency mode, and USB-C fast charging. Pair in two seconds and forget they're in your ears — the kind of audio upgrade you notice on day one.

name: Stonewashed Linen Throw Blanket
description: A cotton-linen blend throw in a soft oat tone, stonewashed for that perfectly lived-in feel. Drapes over a couch like it was styled by a magazine, feels like it's been yours for years.

name: Glow Routine Hydrating Serum
description: A lightweight hyaluronic acid + niacinamide serum that plumps, hydrates, and gives skin that 'did you just get back from vacation?' glow. Fragrance-free, non-comedogenic, layers under anything.

name: Trailrunner Performance Sneakers
description: A breathable mesh upper with a responsive cushioned midsole and all-terrain outsole. Light enough for a morning run, stable enough for a weekend hike. Breaks in on day one.

name: Relaxed Fit Cargo Pants
description: Wide-leg cargo pants with six roomy pockets, an adjustable drawcord waistband, and a streetwear-inspired drape. Heavy-duty cotton twill that softens with every wash.

name: Ribbed Turtleneck Sweater
description: A chunky ribbed-knit turtleneck in a neutral oat colorway. Oversized fit, dropped shoulders, and long enough to layer over anything — jeans, midi skirts, sweats.

name: Portable Mechanical Keyboard
description: A compact 65% wireless mechanical keyboard with tactile switches, per-key RGB, and up to 40 hours on a charge. Satisfying thock, zero wrist strain, fits in a backpack pocket.

name: Smart LED Desk Lamp
description: Touch-controlled LED desk lamp with stepless dimming, adjustable color temperature from warm to daylight, and a built-in USB charging port. Eye-friendly glow for late sessions.

name: Ceramic Pour Over Coffee Set
description: A minimalist matte ceramic pour-over dripper with a matching 12oz mug and a bamboo serving tray. The kind of slow coffee ritual that turns a Tuesday into a moment.

name: Linen Duvet Cover Set
description: Breathable stonewashed French linen duvet cover with two matching pillowcases in warm earthy tones. Gets softer every wash, looks like you styled it without trying.

name: Vitamin C Brightening Moisturizer
description: A lightweight daily moisturizer with 15% stabilized vitamin C, niacinamide, and hyaluronic acid. Evens tone, hydrates, and gives skin a visible glow in about two weeks.

name: Bamboo Charcoal Face Mask Set
description: A pack of 10 biodegradable sheet masks infused with bamboo charcoal, green tea extract, and hyaluronic acid. Detoxifying, hydrating, and genuinely fun to do on a Sunday.

name: Adjustable Resistance Band Set
description: A set of 5 resistance bands ranging from 10 to 50 lbs, with a door anchor, ankle straps, and a mesh carry bag. A full gym's worth of workouts that fits in a drawer.

name: Insulated Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: A 32oz double-wall vacuum-insulated bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours and hot for 12. Leak-proof lid, powder-coated grip finish, fits most car cup holders.

name: Wide Brim Bucket Hat
description: An unstructured wide-brim bucket hat in washed cotton canvas. Packable, lightweight, and shades your whole face without flattening your hair.

name: Vintage Wash Denim Jacket
description: A classic trucker-style denim jacket with a faded vintage wash, antique brass buttons, and a slightly boxy fit. Goes with literally everything you own.

name: Wireless Charging Pad
description: A slim 15W fast-charging Qi pad that works with any compatible phone or earbud case. Soft-touch surface, non-slip base, charges through most thin cases.

name: Noise Cancelling Headphones
description: Over-ear wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, a 30-hour battery, memory-foam ear cushions, and a foldable design that fits in a backpack.

name: Scented Soy Candle Set
description: Three hand-poured soy-wax candles in amber jars — cedar, vanilla, and fresh linen. Long, clean burn and a scent that doesn't scream 'gift shop'.

name: Floating Wall Shelf Set
description: A set of three minimalist solid-wood floating shelves with hidden metal brackets. Installs in minutes, holds books, plants, and the occasional candle.

name: Retinol Night Repair Serum
description: A 0.5% encapsulated retinol serum buffered with peptides and ceramides. Smooths fine lines and wakes up tired skin overnight without redness or flaking.

name: Volumizing Hair Mousse
description: A lightweight styling mousse that lifts roots for natural-looking volume and a soft flexible hold. No crunch, no white flakes, no helmet hair.

name: Foam Roller Recovery Set
description: A high-density EVA foam roller bundled with a trigger-point massage ball and an illustrated stretching guide. Chases out soreness after leg day in minutes.

name: Lightweight Running Cap
description: A moisture-wicking running cap with a pre-curved brim, reflective accents on the back, and an adjustable strap. Stays put through an 8-mile tempo.
